aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.buildSpec:
version: "1.0"
applications:
  - appRoot: frontend
    frontend:
      phases:
        preBuild:
          commands:
            - npm ci
        build:
          commands:
            - npm run build
      artifacts:
        baseDirectory: .next
        files:
          - "**/*"
      cache:
        paths:
          - node_modules/**/*
          - .next/cache/**/*
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: vigil-frontend

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.alarmDescription: ALB target response time > 3s for 5 minutes
